archive_reason: Historical architecture-slice snapshot at commit 69988580; unsupported and not the current benchmark format or performance baseline.

otter_modes.reason: JitSelection::Baseline and JitSelection::Template are equivalent and both select the production tiered policy
no independent optimizer-only selector exists; JitSelection::Baseline and JitSelection::Template are equivalent

architecture_refactor.scope: call linkage, executable lifetime, code-space ownership, feedback ownership, and optimizer pipeline boundaries

performance_validation.reason: architecture-first migration requested; tune and re-profile only after the call/IC/frame boundaries are complete

changes.result: jit_call.rs reduced from 2116 to 1324 lines; resolve, cache, frame, and finish/abort now have focused modules
plain and method calls share callable decoding and ResolvedCallTarget; every plan travels with the exact owning code Arc
cache retains shape/slot/fid/plan/code only; it reloads the callable every invocation and never retains movable closure, capture, this, or argument Values
template and optimizing tiers use one tier-neutral AArch64 compiled-to-compiled call tail
nine parallel direct-call staging fields replaced by one repr(C) record in a MaybeUninit slot with frozen 64-bit layout assertions
activation-publish failure restores caller SP/native frame and aborts the prepared VM frame exactly once without activation underflow
inherited/new upvalue cells and dynamic this remain traced until the callee frame is published

template and optimizing call sites dispatch through one retained CallTrampoline mapping that owns nested JitCtx/NativeFrame construction and the return, exact-PC bail, throw, and activation-overflow lifecycle
each production code generation installs an address-stable CodeEntryCell with unlink-before-retire state and active-entry accounting; registry tombstones are never repurposed

CodeSpace RwLock<Vec<_>> and the per-ExecutionContext synchronized sibling cache were replaced by an append-only chain of immutable chunks with one-shot publication; ordinary reads borrow stable tables without locking

CodeBlock now owns one FeedbackVector containing dense instruction cells, fixed typed atomic slots, and its epoch instead of parallel feedback maps; property and call snapshots use coherent sequence publication without locks

four parallel Interpreter vectors for load/store/has/method ICs and the separate stats field were removed; FeedbackDirectory now owns executable banks, accounting, tracing views, snapshots, and method target distributions behind intent-level operations
backend-neutral OptimizationPipeline produces a verified OptimizedUnit before target eligibility and AArch64 emission
assembler allocation, finalization, representation, opcode, and terminator failures return typed Unsupported fallbacks instead of panicking

runtime contributors operate through FeedbackDirectory operations such as probe_load/probe_store/probe_has, record_property_guard_miss, install_method_ic, and method_load_hit, plus JitCodeRegistry::direct_call_plan, OptimizationPipeline, and the shared call lifecycle; raw CacheStub banks, offsets, entry-cell atomics, and payload publication remain backend-private

correctness_gates.command: cargo check -p otter-vm && cargo check -p otter-jit
cargo test -p otter-vm feedback::tests --no-fail-fast && cargo test -p otter-vm property_ic_stats_record --no-fail-fast
correctness_gates.result: 18 lock-free feedback tests and 5 executable property-IC integration tests passed

correctness_gates.command: cargo test -p otter-vm code_space::tests && cargo test -p otter-vm new_function_links_eval_chunk_into_shared_code_space
correctness_gates.result: 6 append-only code-space ownership/concurrency tests and the escaped new-Function visibility test passed

correctness_gates.command: cargo test -p otter-vm native_abi::code_entry::tests && cargo test -p otter-vm jit_registry::tests
correctness_gates.result: 3 code-entry lifecycle tests and 7 registry lifetime/dependency tests passed
deferred until the architecture migration is coherent; no additional baseline or profiling loop was run in this pass

architecture_roadmap.goal: close the systematic Node/V8 gap by removing mandatory runtime re-entry from common JS execution before local tuning
architecture_roadmap.design_direction: interpreter plus template baseline plus one CFG/SSA optimizer, exposed through intent-level APIs and sharing one logical call ABI, append-only immutable code ownership, fixed-layout lock-free feedback substrate, typed IC recipes, and reconstructible VM state; no thread-local state or mutex/rwlock coordination in call, feedback, or linked-code lookup

phases.name: call_frame_lifetime_contract
deliverables: native JS-to-JS trampoline for eligible fixed-arity plain and method calls
activation descriptor, stack maps, and safe code-entry lifetime/retirement
phases.exit_gate: eligible compiled-call hits perform zero Rust prepare/finish transitions and preserve call/return/throw/GC-stress parity

phases.name: unified_feedback_and_typed_ic_ir
deliverables: immutable feedback metadata plus executable-instance feedback vectors
fixed property/call atomic payloads with coherent sequence snapshots and no mutex/rwlock/thread-local coordination
one isolate FeedbackDirectory owning executable IC banks, counters, snapshots, tracing views, and method distributions
typed data-only IC recipes shared by interpreter, template JIT, and optimizer snapshots
bounded per-kind mono/poly/mega policies without movable Value payloads
phases.exit_gate: all supported dynamic bytecodes use deterministic typed slots and the optimizer no longer reads bespoke feedback maps

phases.name: optimizer_pipeline_boundary
deliverables: AArch64 lowering plan separated from emission
typed compilation errors that fall back instead of panic
phases.exit_gate: neutral optimizer analyses are independently testable and the emitter consumes PlannedOp rather than revalidating raw bytecode

phases.name: targeted_dependencies_deopt_and_osr
deliverables: complete FrameState and exact side-exit recovery
phases.exit_gate: only relevant mutations invalidate code and OSR-to-optimized-to-deopt restores the exact bytecode continuation

phases.name: optimizer_depth
deliverables: side-effect-aware DCE, GVN, LICM, range and bounds-check elimination
bounded call inlining, representation selection, and escape/scalar replacement
phases.exit_gate: each pass has verifier coverage, deterministic output, dependency validation, and measurable suite-level benefit

explicit_non_goals: copying V8's four-tier ladder or tier thresholds
introducing Sea-of-Nodes or another parallel engine stack
forcing identical physical frame layouts across template and optimizing tiers
caching closure environments, this, arguments, or raw movable GC values
adding broad speculation before complete deopt state exists
exposing raw entry addresses, atomics, locks, or ABI offsets to ordinary VM/runtime contributors
